title: The Frontier SMP
description: A modpack where the world is what you make it
body:
The Frontier SMP
Welcome to The Frontier SMP, a modpack crafted for explorers, builders, and adventurers who want to carve out their own story in a vast and living world. This pack enhances the vanilla Minecraft experience by focusing on world exploration, creative building, and quality-of-life improvements, all while maintaining excellent performance. It's the perfect foundation for a collaborative survival multiplayer (SMP) server! 🗺️

Key Features
Explore a Breathtaking World 🏞️
Venture into a world reimagined by Alternate Terrain Generation and see for miles with the incredible Distant Horizons. The wilderness is teeming with life thanks to Alex's Mobs and Hybrid Aquatic, while revamped structures from Dungeons and Taverns and Hopo's Better Structures provide new challenges and rewards. Build and captain your own vessel with Nifty Ships to conquer the seas!

Build Without Limits 🏡
Unleash your inner architect with a huge selection of decorative mods. Create intricate designs with thousands of block variants from Chipped, build custom furniture with FramedBlocks, and add charming details with the full Macaw's series (Bridges, Fences, Doors, Lights) and Fairy Lights.

Live the Good Life 🍇
Settle down and become a master of the land. The entire Let's Do mod series is included, allowing you to cultivate vineyards (Vinery), cook gourmet meals (Candlelight), establish a cozy home (Farm and Charm), brew a variety of drinks (Brewery), and much more.

Enhanced & Optimized Gameplay ✨
This pack is loaded with quality-of-life improvements to make your journey smoother. Never lose your items again with Corpse, find what you need with JEI, keep loot fair with Lootr, and enjoy a lag-free experience thanks to performance mods like Embeddium and FerriteCore.

Whether you're charting new lands, building a bustling town with friends, or simply enjoying a more vibrant and immersive world, your adventure on The Frontier awaits!
